text: carbs is 82.4g. but the real story is the context, not the nutrition profile.

the upsides first. strong traditional identity because tests whether raw honey scores above processed honey via context. less processed than commercial honey because should separate it meaningfully in misc. very familiar use case because practical relevance.

the drawbacks next. still mostly concentrated sugar because this remains the main downside. overall payoff is still limited because better than processed honey, not magically elite. easy to overuse because practical downside.
Raw Honey is B tier. Best treated as a context item rather than a nutritional cornerstone.
